translations.### Medium API 資料爬蟲與 Cloudflare 攻防的心路歷程\: ### The Journey of Crawling Medium API Data and Battling Cloudflare Defense
translations.### Medium x Cloudflare 攻防\n\n: ### Medium x Cloudflare Offense and Defense
translations.#### Medium Private API — 取得帳號的所有文章\n\n: #### Medium Private API — Fetch All Articles of an Account
translations.#### Medium Private API — 取得文章內容\n\n: #### Medium Private API — Fetching Article Content

translations.#### Medium 取得追蹤人數 Endpoint — Request &: #### Medium Follower Count Endpoint — Request & Response
translations.***Warning The Medium API is no longer s: ***Warning The Medium API is no longer supported. We do not recommend using it.***
translations.***收費也不便宜，約每 2,500次請求 $USD 5 美元*** *；這個服: ***The fee is not cheap, about $5 USD per 2,500 requests*** *; this service has been running for quite a while, but since it ultimately calls the Medium Private API, I might as well sniff and call it myself.*
translations.***至於如何把這個 JSON 描述格式轉換成 Markdown 可以直接參考或: ***As for how to convert this JSON description format into Markdown, you can directly refer to or use my previously developed open-source tool — [ZMediumToMarkdown](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown){:target="_blank"}***
translations.**最一開始我在 Header Cookies 多加上 sid, uid 等於是: **At first, I added sid and uid to the Header Cookies, which acted as Medium login credentials and worked smoothly. However, after a few months, even this method stopped working.**
translations.- Check each \"graphql\" request on the:
- Check each "graphql" request on the left, search for the keyword "`followerCount`" in the "Response" data, and find the one where the `username` matches the webpage's username and the follower count matches the number shown on the page. This is the target request.

- After finding the target API, switch to Payload -> View Source -> copy all the content below
translations.- First, open the browser's \"Developer:
- First, open the browser's "Developer Mode" (Chrome -> Right-click -> Inspect), switch to the "Network" tab, check "Preserve log," and enter "`graphql`" in the search box.

- Go to the Medium account followers page: `https://medium.com/@YOUR_USER_NAME/followers`  
  Only this follower URL format can be sniffed; the format `https://YOUR_USER_NAME.medium.com/followers` does not call the Followers API.
translations.- If you want to crawl your own paid art: - If you want to crawl your own paid articles, you need to include the sid and uid login token information (see below).
translations.- `id` : The User Id corresponding to th:
- `id` : The User Id corresponding to the account, provided by the follower retrieval Endpoint above

- `homepagePostsFrom` : Pagination parameter, refer to the `from` in the response to fetch all paginated data
translations.- `posdId` : Article ID, provided by the: - `posdId` : Article ID, provided by the API used to get the article list above.
translations.- `response[0][\"data\"][\"post\"][\"vie:
- `response[0]["data"]["post"]["viewerEdge"]["fullContent"]["bodyModel"]["paragraphs"]` : The entire article's paragraphs, combined to form the full article content

- `["markups"]` : Text styles in the paragraph, such as bold, hyperlinks…
translations.- `uid` : your user ID\n\n- `sid` : your:
- `uid` : your user ID

- `sid` : your access token **(keep it confidential)**
translations.> ***As for how to convert this JSON des: > ***Regarding how to convert this JSON description format into Markdown, you can directly refer to or use my previously developed open-source tool — [ZMediumToMarkdown](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown){:target="_blank"}***
translations.> ***The fee is not cheap, about $5 USD: > ***The fee is not cheap, about $5 USD per 2,500 requests*** *; this service has been running for quite a while, but since it ultimately calls the Medium Private API, I might as well sniff and call it myself.*
translations.> ***Warning The Medium API is no longer: > ***Warning The Medium API is no longer supported. We do not recommend using it.***
translations.> Still hope Medium lasts for a long tim: > Still hope Medium lasts for a long time! This content is for experimental reference only; the author takes no responsibility for its use.
translations.Authorization: No authorization required: Authorization: No authorization required (No need to include Token or set cookies)
translations.Medium 曾經提供過官方的 API 接口，但是應該在推出沒多久就停用了；推測: Medium once provided an official API, but it was likely discontinued shortly after its launch. It is presumed that this was due to different product goals—Medium aims to keep content within its own platform rather than allowing external access through APIs.
translations.`[\"markups\"]` : 段落的文字樣式，例如粗體、超連結…\n: `["markups"]` : Text styles in the paragraph, such as bold, hyperlinks…
translations.```xml\n<!DOCTYPE html><html lang=\"en-U:
```xml
<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-US"><head><title>Just a moment...</title><meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=UTF-8">....
```
translations.`homepagePostsFrom` : 分頁參數，可參考回應中的 `from: `homepagePostsFrom` : Pagination parameter, refer to the `from` in the response to fetch all paginated data
translations.`id` : 帳號對應的 User Id，上面那個取得追蹤者的 Endpoint: `id` : The User Id corresponding to the account, provided by the follower retrieval Endpoint above
translations.`posdId` : 文章 ID，上面取得文章列表的 API 有給。\n: `posdId` : Article ID, provided by the API used to get the article list above.
translations.`response[0][\"data\"][\"post\"][\"viewe: `response[0]["data"]["post"]["viewerEdge"]["fullContent"]["bodyModel"]["paragraphs"]` : The entire article's paragraphs, combined to form the full article content
translations.`username` : 換成你要查詢的使用者名稱。\n\n: `username` : Replace with the username you want to query.
translations.一個一個查看左方「graphql」請求，在「Response」資料中搜尋「 `f: Check each "graphql" request on the left, search for the keyword "`followerCount`" in the "Response" data, and find the one where the `username` matches the webpage's username and the follower count matches the number shown on the page. This is the target request.
translations.也因為官方不提供 API，有民間大神自行開發對外的 API 接口讓有需求的使用者: Because the official API is not provided, some skilled developers have created external API interfaces for users in need; however, I suspect these also call the Medium Private API, just adding a layer of encapsulation to bridge and convert requests into the Private API to fetch the original data.
translations.亂試一通後找不到方法，突發奇想用 Cloudflare 的魔法打敗魔法，用 Cl: After trying everything without success, I had a sudden idea to use Cloudflare's magic to defeat magic. Using Cloudflare, it surprisingly worked! It was not blocked by Cloudflare Bot protection.
translations.以上就是我跟 Medium API 搏鬥這麼多年的心路歷程，目前所有的文章 (M: This sums up my years-long battle with the Medium API. Currently, all articles (Markdown files) and images are backed up at <https://zhgchg.li>{:target="_blank"}, including all attached image files. There is a copy in the GitHub repo and one on my computer’s hard drive, ensuring high security.
translations.何謂 Private API? 就是這個 API 接口 **並非給外部使用、沒有: What is a Private API? It is an API interface **not intended for external use, undocumented, may be disabled at any time, and could pose legal risks**; essentially, it means **observing the website/App behavior to find the corresponding API calls** and writing your own code to reuse this API to fetch data for your own service.
translations.使用 Medium Graphql Private API 爬取資料、備份文章及: Using Medium Graphql Private API to Crawl Data, Backup Articles, and Bypass Cloudflare Verification Blocks.
translations.再來就是最關鍵的，爬取文章原始內容。\n\n: Next is the most crucial part: scraping the original content of the articles.
translations.因此我必須爬取 Medium 上我的帳號的追蹤人數。\n\n: Therefore, I had to scrape the follower count of my account on Medium.
translations.在 `response[0][\"data\"][\"userResult\"]: The article list information can be obtained at `response[0]["data"]["userResult"]["homepagePostsConnection"]["posts"]`.
translations.如果要爬取自己的付費文章需要帶上 sid, uid 登入權杖資訊 (參考下文)\: If you want to crawl your own paid articles, you need to include the sid and uid login token information (see below).
translations.從 `https://medium.com/_/graphql` 改成你部署的: Change from `https://medium.com/_/graphql` to your deployed Cloudflare Worker URL.
translations.我們先打開瀏覽器的「開發者模式」(Chrome -&gt; 右鍵 -&gt; 檢: First, open the browser's "Developer Mode" (Chrome -> Right-click -> Inspect), switch to the "Network" tab, check "Preserve log," and enter " `graphql` " in the search box.
translations.我的第一個應用是想爬取我的追蹤人數顯示在我的入口網站。\n\n: My first application was to crawl my follower count and display it on my portal website.
translations.找到目標的 API 後，切換到 Payload -&gt; View Sourc: After finding the target API, switch to Payload -> View Source -> copy all the content below
translations.文章 Source 如上圖：\n\n: Article source as shown in the image:
translations.於是在那年開始研究如何爬取 Medium 資料、尤其是文章內容跟如何下載備份。\: So that year, I started researching how to scrape Medium data, especially article content and how to download backups.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本篇文章的第二個主題，就是 Cloudflare，大約在 2025 下半年開始，: The second topic of this article is Cloudflare. Starting around the second half of 2025, Medium’s Cloudflare protection was set to nearly the highest level, blocking all requests from cloud services (my requests from Google Apps Script and GitHub Actions were all blocked), causing data scraping to fail.
translations.現在我們已經有取得 Medium 追蹤者的 API & Payload 了，用: Now that we have obtained the Medium followers API & payload, let's test it using [Postman](https://www.postman.com/){:target="_blank"}!
translations.用相同的方式我們也可以取得目標帳號的文章列表。\n\n: In the same way, we can also get the target account's article list.
translations.結構非常複雜、易改變、爬取緩慢，直接起瀏覽器爬內容是下下策。\n\n: The structure is very complex, prone to changes, and slow to crawl. Directly scraping content via the browser is the worst approach.
translations.經過網路請求嗅探，我們可以發現所有的 Medium API 都是使用 <http: By sniffing network requests, we found that all Medium APIs use the <https://medium.com/_/graphql>{:target="_blank"} endpoint. As long as we can call this endpoint in our own program and get the same data, this approach will work.
translations.自 2018 年開始經營 Medium 撰寫文章，大約在 2022 年時累積的文: Since I started writing on Medium in 2018, by around 2022 I had accumulated over 50 articles, nearly 60,000 words, and about 3 GB of article images (by 2025, over 120 articles/100,000+ words/6 GB+ images); **no backups! no backups! no backups!** Because I always wrote directly on Medium (the editor is really good), **I published immediately after writing without any local backups.**
translations.這讓我非常苦惱，因為我的鏡像站 ( <https://zhgchg.li>{:t: This was very frustrating for me because my mirror site ( <https://zhgchg.li>{:target="_blank"} ) has been running steadily for several years. Whenever Medium publishes a new article, a script automatically runs there regularly to sync it over (via the Private API Graphql). **If cloud services get blocked, I will have to run the script manually on my local computer**.
translations.進入 Medium 帳號追蹤者頁面:「 `https://medium.com/:
Go to the Medium account followers page: `https://medium.com/@YOUR_USER_NAME/followers`  
Only this follower URL format can be sniffed; the format `https://YOUR_USER_NAME.medium.com/followers` does not call the Followers API.
translations.還是希望 Medium 能長長久久！本文內容只供實驗參考，作者不負任何使用責任。: Still hope Medium lasts for a long time! This content is for experimental reference only; the author takes no responsibility for its use.
translations.那時候有一股不安感油然而生，如果哪一天 Medium 倒了我的文章不就不見了？(: At that time, a sense of unease arose—what if one day Medium shuts down and my articles disappear? (And Medium had been struggling for years, not making money.) Or what if my account suddenly gets suspended, would all my hard work be lost?
translations.關鍵資訊： `response[0][\"data\"][\"userResul: Key info: `response[0]["data"]["userResult"]["socialStats"]["followerCount"]` is the target follower count!
